creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The recently released Amarok v2.1 requires an external instance of qtscriptgenerator ( http://code.google.com/p/qtscriptgenerator/ ).  The attached shell archive is a workable port of qtscriptgenerator that brings at least enough functionality to build and run Amarok 2.1.  Problems that I know of with this version:

- The Qt4 dependencies likely have some extras listed
- The phonon portion of the port does not work with the KDE4 phonon version and is explicitly disabled in this version of the port

What I know works:
- All tests generated by the port run successfully on my i386 7-STABLE workstation

I need some version of this port committed before I can update audio/amarok-kde4 to version 2.1.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
